title: cyperaceae
intro: The cyperaceae rank is a family of monocot flowering plants, commonly known as sedge family. This rank is characterized by plants with small, scale-like leaves and triangular stems, often found in wetland environments. Cyperaceae is a diverse group of plants that includes around 5,000 species, ranging from small sedges to larger, more complex plants. Members of the cyperaceae family are often found in a variety of habitats, including wetlands, grasslands, and even urban areas.
